title: Global Leaders Hold Emergency Climate Summit in Geneva
description: World leaders meet in Switzerland to discuss urgent climate policies and global cooperation.
content:
## Global Climate Meeting

Leaders from more than **40 countries** gathered in Geneva to discuss urgent climate policies and economic cooperation.

### Major Topics

- Reducing carbon emissions
- Supporting developing economies
- Renewable energy transition
